LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS JOHNNY YUEN, AND BANG HOANG'S SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR MALICOUS PROSECUTION IS GRANTED.
